title: Modded QOL
description: A modpack for testing and playing mod directly in the game (with the cursforge API)
body:
### **[What is modded QOL ?]** 
modded QOL is an optimization and QOL (quality of life) modpack
already configured for good performance and above all allowing you to test mods directly in the game (without having to manipulate the files), using the cursforge API with "mod browser"


### **[features]**
- A mod browser (support the texture pack)
- Some QOL feature like zoom , connected texture , carpet and other...
- A lot of optimisation mod (already configured for the best)
- The mod "essential" to play with your friend (with no server)
